title: Bloo's Gacha Machine v.2
description: Exchange items for gacha capsules, test your luck and see what surprises wait inside!
body:
## Bloo's Gacha Machine - Your New Favorite Way to ~~Lose~~ Spend All Your Hard-Earned Resources!

Ah, the gacha loot system. Spanning across many games, it is something that many of us either love or hate. Whether you're a whale or a F2P, we've all had our hopes crushed by really bad RNG. But hear me out, what if you can bring gacha pulls... _into Minecraft?_

This mod lets you **craft and place a Gacha Machine anywhere in your Minecraft world**, ready to ruin or brighten your day with unpredictable loot. Craft your Emeralds into Gacha Coins, insert 5 of them into the machine, and out pops a **capsule filled with random loot!**

It could be something amazing.. or something you’ll be staring, questioning why you just wasted your hard-earned Emeralds.

![Gacha machine in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71647427889ee3bd4c6a0aa05e7c86014af8e092_0.webp)


Have up to 10 machines in a single world! Craft the new color variations by combining the base machine with proper dyes. This also means you'll be able to customize capsules and gacha coins for each machine. 

![New machine color variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0ae875099715c2e41c372bb807675aa64bc6724_0.webp)


# NEW UPDATE -  "YOUR OWN SPIN" (v.2) rolls in!

Enjoying your gacha pulls so far? Good news for you gacha addicts out there, update v.1.1 is here to boost your gacha experience to let you pull more and more!

Enjoying your gacha pulls so far? It's been a while since the last update, but we have been cooking behind the scenes to deliver a better, more customizable sweet gacha experience!

You can now customize your machines even more, through new configs! **You can make machines drop capsules on the ground, or straight up to your inventory.** Place **cooldowns** on your machines to prevent excessive gambling and practice self restraint! **Automate your gacha addiction with hoppers and the like!**

Gacha machine models have also been updated to use **Geckolib Animated Models** to support animations, so Geckolib is now a dependency!

And the best for last, **Bloo's Gacha Machine is also now available for Neoforge to satiate popular demand!**






## Features:
**Craftable Gacha Machine:** Gather some iron ingots, glass, and a dispenser to craft a Gacha Machine, and place it wherever you want as gambling relief or just decoration. Would look great when you're trying to build an arcade!

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6959568a1d59acd503adcc4910102f663bcd8130_0.webp)

**Capsules Galore:** Trade in your hard-earned currency for capsules, each with loot that's divided into five exciting tiers: **Basic** (Normal), **Copper** (Uncommon), **Iron** (Rare), **Diamond** (Super Rare), and **Netherite** (Ultra Rare).

**Datapack Support:** Don't want to trade Emeralds for potential garbage? You can adjust the machine’s look and its loot tables via datapacks. Want to make it drop only rare ores, delicious food, or glimmering potions and enchanted books? It's a fully customizable gacha pull experience in Minecraft.

![Datapackable machines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bade0c87eaec71dda83429e7cb8b7f0a9b327855_0.webp)

## You’ll laugh, you’ll groan, you’ll cheer or scoot. The endless loot is a wild pursuit!

### P.S. MASSIVE THANKS to hisRoyalty, for being the super awesome programmer behind this mod who absolutely delivered! All assets done by yours truly.


Have questions, want to view the loot tables, or want to try making your own addon for BGM? Visit the guide [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1AKjqLy6S8leh_qAg_ATlUcj3T7uENHeOPuBYw7NitX8/edit?usp=sharing).

Download the addon template [here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1D56gVmtse-oCCi7RL1UkX9RzYfxyTAGh?usp=sharing).


[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/sjyv8HcdP2) to receive news and updates on Bloo's Gacha Machine, and all my other creations :D

## **IMPORTANT!**
Please update your previously made addon packs to match the new guide, especially resource packs.
